figures.title: 霍尔木兹海峡通航量随美伊敌对行动骤降
figures.analysis: 彭博「今日图表」跟踪霍尔木兹海峡日通航量：美伊冲突升级后（灰色「伊朗战争」区间）通航量长期处于近零水平；6月临时和平协议后仅有短暂回升，7月再度走弱。含义：实体通行恢复滞后于外交 headlines，实体通行恢复滞后于外交窗口——停火若未带来通航量回升，油价与长端利率的供给侧溢价可能持续主导跨资产定价。

marketTone: Jul 21 US chip rebound (S&P +0.89% to 7,509.20, Nasdaq +1.29%) diverges from Brent $91.01 settle (+2%) and 10y 4.63% two-month high. Hormuz shipping near zero per Bloomberg chart; USD/JPY breaks 163 (彭博 Jul 22; Yahoo ~163.16). CSRC Mon–Tue stability symposiums; PBOC +1000亿元 支农支小再贷款. SMCI backlog >$60bn, GM 15–17%. Jul 22 data slate: Japan trade, UK CPI, Taiwan unemployment.

summary.text: Jul 21 US official close (Yahoo Finance): S&P +0.89% to 7,509.20, Nasdaq +1.29% to 25,837.21, Dow +0.74% to 52,224.64 — three-day losing streak snapped on chip/memory rebound (Micron +12%+; PHLX Semi +4.9% per 华尔街见闻 Jul 21). Brent settled $91.01 (+2.0%); 10y 4.63% (+3 bp, two-month high).

Middle East escalation (CNBC Jul 21): US 10th consecutive strike night; Iran hit Hormuz tanker; Houthis declared Saudi maritime embargo; mediators propose 10-day ceasefire but Trump downplays Iran talks (彭博 Jul 22). Bloomberg chart shows Hormuz daily transits near zero since conflict onset — Brent five-week high despite diplomacy headlines.

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

summary.text: Jul 21 SMCI preliminary (CNBC): Q4 revenue near low end of $11.0–12.5bn guide; GAAP/non-GAAP gross margin 15–17% vs prior 8.2–8.4% guide; >$60bn new orders in Q4 — shares +15% after hours. Intel confirmed further Data Center/AI layoffs ahead of Jul 23 earnings (彭博 Jul 22).

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

summary.text: China policy (彭博/第一财经 Jul 21–22): CSRC Mon–Tue symposiums with listed companies pledge to enhance market intrinsic stability; PBOC added 1000亿元 支农支小再贷款额度 for flood/disaster regions (广西/湖北/甘肃/浙江). 月之暗面据悉8月启动最高500亿美元估值Pre-IPO；中际旭创香港IPO拟募资不超过550亿港元。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

summary.text: FX/crypto: USD/JPY breaks 163 for the first time since 1986 — intervention risk elevated (彭博 Jul 22; Yahoo ~163.16 as of Jul 22). Prior session (Mitrade Jul 21) had printed a 162.70 high (~15 pips below the 162.84 40-year mark). BTC ~$66,400 five-week high (CoinDesk Jul 21) as chip rebound and Clarity Act progress offset tariff headlines.

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

signal: Jul 21 chip-led US rebound (S&P +0.89%) runs into Brent $91.01 and Hormuz transits near zero — oil/geo inflation channel still dominates forward pricing (10y 4.63%) even as SMCI >$60bn backlog and BTC ~$66.4k signal AI/crypto dip-buying. CSRC stability symposiums + PBOC 1000亿元 relending anchor China policy bid into Jul 22 data slate (Japan trade, UK CPI, Taiwan unemployment).
watch: Does Jul 21 chip bounce hold through Alphabet/Tesla Jul 22 earnings and Brent ≥$91 — and do Jul 22 Japan trade / UK CPI prints re-price the oil→rates chain? Hormuz chart recovery vs ceasefire rhetoric is the falsifier for energy inflation.
globalRegime: Fed holds 3.50%–3.75% with Jul 14–15 CPI/PPI misses backward-looking while Jul 21 Brent $91.01 (+2%) and 10y 4.63% (two-month high) re-price forward inflation on Hormuz/Houthi supply risk. Jul 21 US equities snapped a 3-day losing streak on chip rebound (S&P +0.89%) but Citadel Rubner (华尔街见闻 Jul 21) says earnings must validate the reset. Jul 28–29 FOMC and Mag 7 earnings (Alphabet/Tesla Jul 22) are the next hard tests.

globalChanged.text: 特朗普淡化与伊朗谈判可能性，并称将在红海航运受威胁时采取行动。伊朗总统称穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊正参与更多决策，指示必须结束“非战非和”的局面（彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶 Jul 22）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: Jul 21 Middle East (CNBC): US completed 10th consecutive evening strike on Iran; Iran attacked Hormuz tanker; Houthis declared immediate maritime embargo on Saudi Arabia; mediators propose 10-day ceasefire but oil held firm — Brent settled +2.0% at $91.01 (five-week high), WTI $84.91.
海湾阿拉伯国家据悉对美伊战争走向分歧加深，部分盟友希望华府加码打击伊朗以迫使后者屈服。也门胡塞武装据悉警告所有船只勿停靠沙特港口；封锁威胁前沙特从红海沿岸码头出口的原油创下历史新高（彭博 Jul 22）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: 随着临时关税即将到期，美国政府据悉准备以强迫劳动为由最迟周五对数十个贸易伙伴征收新关税（彭博 Jul 22； TechTimes Jul 20：Section 122 10% surcharge expires Jul 24; proposed Section 301 forced-labor replacement 10–12.5% on 46–60 economies).

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: 加拿大总理卡尼与特朗普同意在美国50%关税生效前加紧谈判，卡尼称如果白宫最终实施这些关税，加拿大已准备作出回应（彭博 Jul 22）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: 英国首相伯纳姆主持首次内阁会议，承诺恪守财政纪律，新任财政大臣希利也呼应了这一立场（彭博 Jul 22；延续 Jul 21 gilt selloff context).

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: 日元兑美元自1986年以来首次跌破163，日本当局入市干预支撑日元的风险上升（彭博 Jul 22； Mitrade Jul 21: USD/JPY session high 162.70, ~15 pips below 40-year high 162.84).

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: SpaceX的大规模解禁潮即将来临，8月6日将有多达9.115亿股解除禁售限制，价值逾千亿美元（彭博 Jul 22）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: 苹果据悉将推出名为Apple Upgrade的设备租赁计划以刺激销售，新服务计划于7月28日上线（彭博 Jul 22）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: 英特尔股价周二大涨，该公司确认将进一步裁员，以削减成本并调整关键的数据中心部门 — Q2 earnings Jul 23 AMC (彭博 Jul 22).

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: OpenAI首席执行官计划下周向美国官员介绍下一代人工智能模型；全球公共事务主管称美国需要更全面AI战略以与中国竞争（彭博 Jul 22）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: Jul 21 SMCI preliminary (CNBC): Q4 revenue near $11.0bn low end of guide; gross margin 15–17% vs 8.2–8.4% prior guide; >$60bn new Q4 orders — shares +15% after hours; earnings call Aug 11.
Jul 21 US official close (Yahoo Finance): S&P +0.89% to 7,509.20, Nasdaq +1.29% to 25,837.21, Dow +0.74% to 52,224.64 — chip/memory led (Micron +12%+); snapped 3-day losing streak.

Jul 21 rates: 10y 4.63% (+3 bp, two-month high), 2y 4.26% (+5 bp), 30y 5.13% (+2 bp) — oil/geo inflation premium despite ceasefire headlines (CNBC narrative; bp deltas aligned to U.S. Treasury daily curve).
Jul 21 (华尔街见闻 3776959): Citadel Rubner — 10-item checklist "基本转绿"; retail net-buying 3.2× historical Jul average; Q2 S&P EPS growth expected +22.4%; "超级碗" earnings week tests whether reset extends.
Jul 21 crypto (CoinDesk): BTC five-week high ~$66,400 (+3% 24h) on Clarity Act progress and Asian chip rebound; ETF inflows fifth straight day.

globalImplies.text: Jul 21 chip rebound without oil relief confirms dual-regime tape — SMCI >$60bn backlog validates AI demand but Brent $91.01 keeps 10y pinned at 4.63% ahead of Jul 28–29 FOMC.
Hormuz transits near zero (Bloomberg chart) means ceasefire headlines alone won't ease inflation pricing unless vessel counts recover — Rystad 2.5mb/d Saudi Red Sea risk adds second chokepoint.
Rubner's "reset complete" frame raises earnings-week bar — Alphabet/Tesla Jul 22 must offset forced-labor tariff deadline and JPY 163 intervention risk.

globalTensions: Jul 21 S&P +0.89% vs Brent $91.01; BTC ~$66.4k vs 10y 4.63%; SMCI GM 15–17% vs Intel layoffs; chip rebound vs Hormuz near-zero transits; Rubner reset-complete vs oil inflation re-pricing.
chinaStance: Moderately loose via targeted relending (PBOC +1000亿元 支农支小再贷款 Jul 21) and explicit stability messaging (CSRC Mon–Tue symposiums per 彭博/第一财经), cautious on price — Jul LPR held 3.0%/3.5%. Bessent AI IP review and US-China AI talks before Xi visit keep tech/trade channel active; no LPR-cut signal while Brent ≥$91.

chinaChanged.text: 中国证监会周一和周二与上市公司等召开座谈会，就促进资本市场稳定健康发展听取意见。证监会称将主动回应市场关切、增强市场内在稳定性（彭博 Jul 22；第一财经 Jul 21 证券基金机构/上市公司代表系列座谈).

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

chinaChanged.text: Jul 21 A-share official close (网易财经): Shanghai +1.79%, Shenzhen +4.81%, ChiNext +7.05%, STAR +10.73%; turnover 2.96tn yuan — prior session for Jul 22 morning slot.
特朗普暗示无意就干预选举的指控追责北京，称中美都会对彼此采取行动，而且中国如今的情况与当年可能有所不同（彭博 Jul 22）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

chinaChanged.text: 美国财长贝森特表示，许多中国AI模型被发现带有美国大语言模型的印记，将审查是否存在窃取知识产权的情况。据报中美计划于习近平访美前就人工智能问题举行会谈（彭博 Jul 22）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

chinaChanged.text: 澳新银行集团经济学家邢兆鹏预计，随着劳动力供过于求的情况加剧，未来两个月中国青年失业率可能逼近20%（彭博 Jul 22； single-source economist forecast).

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

chinaChanged.text: 中国银行间市场交易商协会收紧熊猫债信用评级管理，新规将于8月1日起正式施行。印尼获准未来两年在中国银行间债券市场发行总额不超过300亿元人民币的熊猫债，首批计划募资70亿元（彭博 Jul 22）。

中国医药控股在美股市场一度创纪录暴涨逾2000%，收盘升幅仍近八倍（彭博 Jul 22； single-source micro-cap move).

Moonshot $50bn pre-IPO / InnoLight HK IPO / TSMC price hikes show AI supply-chain capital still flowing despite Bessent IP scrutiny narrative.
ANZ youth-unemployment-approaching-20% forecast (single-source) keeps labor anxiety live even after Jun NBS 14.9% print — Politburo easing expectations unchanged.

chinaDivergences: Jul 21 Shanghai +1.79%/ChiNext +7.05% vs Jul 21 S&P +0.89%; BTC ~$66.4k vs Brent $91.01; SMCI GM 15–17% vs Intel layoffs; US chip rebound vs Hormuz near-zero transits; MCHI ETF −1.17% vs Jul 21 A-share rally (彭博 snapshot).

signals.name: Jul 21 Brent $91.01 settle (five-week high)
signals.evidence: CNBC Jul 21: Brent +2.0% at $91.01; WTI $84.91; US 10th strike night; Houthi Saudi embargo; Hormuz tanker hit.
signals.mechanism: Official settle locks Middle East supply premium into forward inflation pricing ahead of Jul 28–29 FOMC and Jul 22 UK CPI.
signals.disprovedIf: Brent official settle below $82 for three sessions with Hormuz transits >40/day.

signals.name: Hormuz shipping near zero (Bloomberg chart)
signals.evidence: 彭博今日图表 Jul 22: daily transits fell from 100–140 pre-conflict to near zero; brief Jun peace spike to ~45–50 already fading in Jul.

evidenceSources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

signals.mechanism: Physical chokepoint data overrides ceasefire headline risk — explains 10y 4.63% despite Jul 21 equity rebound.
signals.disprovedIf: Bloomberg daily transits sustain >60 vessels/day for two weeks with Brent <$85.

signals.name: Jul 21 US chip rebound (S&P +0.89%)
signals.evidence: Yahoo Finance Jul 21: S&P 7,509.20 (+0.89%), Nasdaq +1.29%, Dow +0.74%; Micron +12%+; PHLX Semi +4.9% (华尔街见闻); snapped 3-day losing streak.
signals.mechanism: Partial AI/semi recovery tests whether earnings week can extend Rubner reset against Brent ≥$91 headwind.
signals.disprovedIf: S&P closes below 7,450 within three sessions with SOX −3% same week.

signals.name: SMCI >$60bn backlog / GM 15–17%
signals.evidence: CNBC Jul 21: preliminary Q4 revenue near $11.0bn low end; gross margin 15–17% vs 8.2–8.4% guide; >$60bn new orders; +15% after hours.
signals.mechanism: Record AI-server backlog validates demand layer even as Intel layoffs show cost-cutting — split read on semi profitability.
signals.disprovedIf: Full Aug 11 report shows GM reverting below 10% with order cancellations disclosed.

signals.name: USD/JPY breaks 163 — intervention risk
signals.evidence: 彭博 Jul 22: USD/JPY breaks 163 for first time since 1986; Yahoo ~163.16 (Jul 22). Mitrade Jul 21 prior session high 162.70 (~15 pips below 40-year high 162.84).

watchItems.headline: Jul 22 earnings — Alphabet/Tesla after close
watchItems.why: STRONG chip rebound + Rubner reset-complete need Mag 7 validation.
watchItems.watch: Alphabet/Tesla Jul 22 AMC capex/cloud margin commentary vs Brent ≥$91.
watchItems.trigger: Either cuts AI capex guide with S&P below 7,450.
watchItems.invalidator: Both maintain or raise capex with SOX +3% and S&P above 7,550.

watchItems.headline: Brent $91.01 vs Hormuz transits
watchItems.why: STRONG oil settle + chart near-zero transits.
watchItems.watch: Official Wed Brent settle; daily Hormuz vessel counts; Houthi Saudi embargo follow-through.
watchItems.invalidator: Official settle below $82 with transits >40/day for five sessions.

watchItems.headline: Jul 22 data slate — Japan trade / UK CPI / Taiwan unemployment
watchItems.watch: 07:50 Japan Jun trade balance (est −1200bn yen vs prior −3918bn); 07:50 exports +18% est; 14:00 UK Jun CPI +2.7% est vs 2.8% prior; 16:00 Taiwan Jun unemployment 3.3% est.
watchItems.trigger: UK CPI beat estimate (>2.7%) with gilt yields rising alongside US 10y >4.65%.
watchItems.invalidator: UK CPI miss estimate with 10y gilt stable and Brent easing.

watchItems.headline: Forced-labor tariff deadline (Fri)
watchItems.why: 彭博 Jul 22 — ≥10% tariffs on dozens of partners as temporary tariffs expire.
watchItems.watch: White House proclamation timing; EM/Asia FX reaction; US 10y term premium.
watchItems.trigger: Tariffs announced ≥10% on major US trading partners with DXY spike.
watchItems.invalidator: Deadline extended with no new proclamation by Fri close.

watchItems.headline: JPY intervention risk at 163
watchItems.why: MODERATE 40-year low with oil-driven rate divergence.
watchItems.watch: USD/JPY above 163; MOF/BOJ rhetoric; Jul 22 Japan trade print.
watchItems.trigger: USD/JPY closes above 163.50 with verbal intervention followed by checkable FX ops.
watchItems.invalidator: Sustained trade below 160 without intervention headlines.

watchItems.headline: CSRC stability symposium follow-through
watchItems.why: MODERATE policy bid after Jul 21 A-share chip rally.
watchItems.watch: CSRC concrete measures post Mon–Tue meetings; STAR/chip index vs Jul 21 +10.73%.
watchItems.trigger: New buyback/dividend mandates with Shanghai holding 3,850+ through US earnings.
watchItems.invalidator: Shanghai breaks 3,800 on rising volume despite CSRC pledges.

watchItems.headline: 王毅东盟外长会 / 欧洲议会代表团访华 (Jul 22–23)
watchItems.why: 彭博 央行和政府动态 diplomatic calendar.
watchItems.watch: Jul 22 王毅出席中国—东盟外长会（马尼拉）；22–23日欧洲议会外交事务委员会代表团访华。
watchItems.trigger: Marketable trade/diplomatic breakthrough on AI/tariff channel.
watchItems.invalidator: Events pass with no policy delta priced in CNH or H-shares.

watchItems.headline: Intel Q2 earnings Jul 23 AMC
watchItems.why: Layoffs confirmed Jul 21; foundry turnaround narrative vs SMCI backlog.
watchItems.watch: Data Center/AI revenue vs $5.05bn Q1; 18A foundry commentary.
watchItems.trigger: DC/AI miss with guide cut and SOX −3% same session.
watchItems.invalidator: Beat with stable GM guide and Intel +5% next day.

sources: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶 (Jul 22), CNBC (Jul 21 US close/oil/Treasury/Iran/SMCI), CoinDesk (Jul 21 BTC), 华尔街见闻 3776959 (Jul 21 Citadel Rubner), 第一财经 103284305 (Jul 21 CSRC symposium), BlockBeats 59069 (Jul 21 BitGo IPO), 中国经济网 (Jul 21 PBOC relending), Mitrade (Jul 21 JPY), TechTimes (Jul 20 tariffs), 网易财经 (Jul 21 A-share close).
singleSource: Omitted BlockBeats 303712 (Trump BTC video — prior CI unreachable). Rejected BlockBeats stale flashes in 59069 body (BTC $120k reference is editorial background, not used for levels). ANZ youth-unemployment-approaching-20% via Bloomberg inbox only. China Medical Holdings +800% micro-cap move via Bloomberg inbox only. Glassnode Insights not merged — no fresh on-chain capture. 今日图表 PNG at web/public/inbox-charts/bloomberg-2026-07-22.png (霍尔木兹通航量). 市场一览 desk color in marketOverview. Morning slot (Beijing 08:00): Jul 21 US close + Jul 21 A-share as latest verified prints; Jul 22 Asia session opens on this run.

marketOverview.note: Qualitative desk color from 彭博财经早茶 — not official closes.

source.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

items.label: 美国股市
items.text: 纳斯达克100指数创下三周来最佳单日表现，以人工智能交易为核心的芯片股反弹，盖过美伊冲突再度升级带来的影响

items.label: 中概股
items.text: 金龙中国指数下跌，网易和百胜中国对指数拖累最大

items.label: 美国债市
items.text: 10年期和30年期国债收益率触及两个月高点，油价上涨推高加息预期

items.label: 外汇市场
items.text: 彭博美元指数随美国国债收益率上涨，日元回落至40年以来最低水平

items.label: 欧洲股债
items.text: 欧洲债市涨跌互见，欧洲股市止步两连跌，科技股和强劲财报提供支撑

items.label: 能源
items.text: 布伦特原油升至6月初以来最高，交易员权衡霍尔木兹海峡、红海、俄罗斯海上运输风险

items.label: 金属
items.text: 逢低买盘推动黄金和白银上涨。中国供应紧张迹象推动铜价升至1个多月高点

marketDashboard.note: Equities, FX, gold futures, and Brent futures use the latest two Yahoo daily closes (Brent row is Yahoo BZ=F — not the same print as CNBC official settle when both appear); US Treasuries use the official daily yield curve (bp vs prior print); BTC is CoinGecko 24h change; funding compares adjacent OKX prints. Snapshot captured at generate time — not live on the page.
